title: Crispy Pork Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Peruvian-inspired dish with crispy pork and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced bitter gourd and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped crisp lettuce and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and diced chili pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Return the pork to the skillet and stir in the stir-fry sauce.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
